zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Wemyss於1394年出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏時，她的父親John Wemyss - Lord of Reres26歲，母親Isabel Erskine20歲。她於1418年8月31日與Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray在英國蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1470年5月15日在英國蘇格蘭培爾享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Wemyss于1394年出生在英国苏格兰費伏时，她的父亲John Wemyss - Lord of Reres26岁，母亲Isabel Erskine20岁。她于1418年8月31日与Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray在英国苏格兰培爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1470年5月15日在英国苏格兰培爾享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wemyss
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Wemyss in Fife, traditionally pronounced ‘weems’. The placename is from Gaelic uaimh ‘cave’ + the placename forming suffix –es. The surname reached Ireland in the 14th century, see Wims .

variants.name: Wims
meanings: Irish: variant of Scottish   Wemyss  , representing the usual pronunciation of that Scottish name.

variants.name: Weems
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Wemyss  , reflecting the usual pronunciation of that name.

History: David Weems (Wemyss) emigrated from Scotland to Herring Bay, Anne Arundel County, MD, some time before 1722. Mason Locke Weems, born near Herring Bay in 1759, was a clergyman who wrote a biography of George Washington, in which the first account of the cherry-tree story appeared.

variants.name: Wymbs
meanings: Irish: variant of Scottish   Wemyss  . Compare   Wims  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Wemyss was born in 1394, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Wemyss - Lord of Reres, was 26 and her mother, Isabel Erskine, was 20. She married Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray on 31 August 1418, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 15 May 1470, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Wemyss est née en 1394, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Wemyss - Lord of Reres, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel Erskine, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray le 31 août 1418, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 mai 1470, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Wemyss 1394 in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Wemyss - Lord of Reres 26 und ihre Mutter Isabel Erskine 20. Sie hat am 31. August 1418 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Mai 1470 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wemyss è nata il nel 1394 nel Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Wemyss - Lord of Reres, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Isabel Erskine, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray il 31 agosto 1418, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 maggio 1470, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wemyssが1394年にイギリススコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父John Wemyss - Lord of Reresは26歳，母Isabel Erskineは20歳であった。1418年8月31日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアでAndrew Gray 1st Lord Grayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1470年5月15日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wemyss(이)가 1394년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Wemyss - Lord of Reres(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Erskine(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1418년 8월 31일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 5월 15일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wemyss nasceu em 1394, em Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Wemyss - Lord of Reres, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Erskine, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray em 31 de agosto de 1418, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de maio de 1470, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Wemyss родилась в 1394 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Wemyss - Lord of Reres было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Erskine, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray 31 августа 1418 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 15 мая 1470 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.
